upgrade_source: MTA press release: MTA Announces Greenpoint Av G Station Now Fully Accessible; Brooklyn Paper; Wikipedia (Greenpoint Avenue station)
notes: Three elevators: one from mezzanine to street level on eastern side of Manhattan Ave north of Greenpoint Ave, one to each platform. Construction started September 2018, completed late November 2020 (expected December 2020). 29 months to complete. Cost $23.4 million. Second elevator ever installed on the G line.
